rulings.Case Title: MIGUEL E. JARA VS. MARIA ELISA PALMA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Stay Distribution Of Net Proceeds From Partition Sale
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 28, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF MIGUEL JARA MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Stay Distribution Of Net Proceeds From Partition Sale Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA DEL RAYO VASQUEZ VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC A BUSINESS ENTITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 28, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES D. BANKS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 28, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT COURTHOUSE VENTURES INC., XIAOWEN LI, JOSEPH GIRAUDO, BEVERLY GIRAUDO, YOUNG LIANG DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. COA 4: Plaintiff failed to provide facts to show illegal, fraudulent or willfully oppressive sale of the property. COA 5: Plaintiff failed to properly plead quiet title action and failed to provide facts to show legal merit to the claim. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES D. BANKS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 28, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. COA 1: Plaintiff failed to provide facts to show evidence of a contact. COA 2: Plaintiff failed to provide facts to show a promise by Wells Fargo reasonably expected to induce action or forbearance on the part of the Plaintiff and which did induce such action or forbearance. COA 3: Plaintiff failed to provide facts to show unjust enrichment on the part of Wells Fargo. COA 4: Plaintiff failed to provide facts to show an illegal, fraudulent or willfully oppressive sale of the property. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SMZ LANDHOLDINGS LLC VS. XIUQIONG HE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday November 28, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT XIUQIONG HE, RUIJEN LIANG, BAOYI LIANG, XIAO LI, XIXIANG LIANG, QIANRU XU DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)
